title: Red Knight
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Red Knight''' was a group of four [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|''Delta''-class JV-7 escort shuttles]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They were sent to assist in the evacuation of a [[XQ3 Platform|facility]] in the [[Parmel system/Legends|Parmel system]] where [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] had overseen the development of the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] before his coup against [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and which was now under attack from Zaarin's forces. The Red Knight group helped ensure that the facility's two remaining TIE Defender prototypes and personnel were safely evacuated on the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Mharsup]]'' and the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] ''[[G'nabgib]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
